name: teams-domain-test-schema
description: Teams domain provides comprehensive test schema with: Organization (basic), Team (self-ref via parentId), Membership (polymorphic refs to Org or Team), App (required FK), Invitation (enum status, expiresAt timestamp). Covers all reference patterns needed for DDL testing.
recommendation: Use Teams domain as primary integration test schema. Also consider Auth domain for simpler User/Session pattern.
